title: Cillian Murphy and Stars at Peaky Blinders Movie Premiere
summary: Cillian Murphy and other stars went to a big movie premiere in Birmingham for the Peaky Blinders film called The Immortal Man. Many fans dressed in flat caps and tweed came to see the actors like Rebecca Ferguson and Tim Roth. The film continues the TV show about Tommy Shelby, a gang leader, during World War Two. Steven Knight, who created the show, said Birmingham is a star of the film because it was filmed there. Murphy agreed that the city and Peaky Blinders are connected. The premiere was held in Birmingham to honor the fans and the show's history. The film will be in cinemas for two weeks and then on Netflix. Fans from places like Derby came to meet the stars, showing how much they love the show.

background_read: Peaky Blinders is a popular TV show from England about a gang in Birmingham after World War One. It has many fans who like the story and characters. Cillian Murphy plays Tommy Shelby, the gang leader. The new film, The Immortal Man, continues this story during World War Two. Premieres are special events where movies are shown for the first time, often with actors and fans attending. Birmingham is an important city in England known for its history and culture.
Article_Structure: WHO: Cillian Murphy, other stars like Rebecca Ferguson and Tim Roth, fans, and Steven Knight
WHAT: A premiere for the Peaky Blinders film The Immortal Man in Birmingham
WHERE: Birmingham, England at Symphony Hall
WHY: To celebrate the film's release, honor the fans, and connect with the city where it was made

perspectives.description: Fans dressed up and traveled to see the stars, showing their love for Peaky Blinders.
